message:
test(conflict): add comprehensive tests for conflict detection service

Add 27 tests covering:
- Reservation conflict detection (overlap, no overlap, same agent)
- Resource contention detection (exclusive, write/read, time window)
- Conflict management (tracking, filtering, getting by ID)
- Conflict resolution (resolve, remove from active, keep in history)
- Recommended actions for different conflict types
- Conflict history with pagination
- Statistics tracking
- Alert configuration

Also add clear() method to ReservationConflictEngine for test isolation.

Part of flywheel_gateway-msz acceptance criteria.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
